content.Text:
[Mon 2026-04-20 16:09 CDT] The Content Engine page file was not created. The import and route already exist in App.tsx but the actual page file is missing.

Create this file: `/Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/postengine/social-post-manager/client/src/pages/content-engine.tsx`

Also check if the API endpoint was added in `/Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/postengine/social-post-manager/server/routes.ts` and the sidebar nav item in `/Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/postengine/social-post-manager/client/src/components/app-sidebar.tsx`.

The page should include these sections matching PostEngine's dark theme using shadcn/ui components and Tailwind:

**A. Content Cadence** — fetch from `GET /api/content-engine/cadence`, show table with dealership, post type, posts/day, platforms. If empty array returned, show notice "No cadence configured yet — set up in PostEngine Settings."

**B. Active Shoots** — hardcoded table:
- Audi Baton Rouge | Q5 Black Optic feature content (photos + video) | Adrian | Pending
- Audi Baton Rouge | Staff intro videos for Podium | Adrian | Pending

**C. Content Needed** — 4 cards:
- Brian Harris BMW: Feature photos (no front plates), Staff intro videos, M/Sport lot content
- Audi Baton Rouge: Q5 Black Optic photos/video, Staff intro videos, Q7 lifestyle content
- BMW of Jackson: Dealership exterior/aerial shot, Lot lineup content, 5 Series feature content
- Harris Porsche: Dealership exterior/aerial shot, Parts/merchandise product photos

**D. Brand Guidelines** — 4 cards:
- BHBMW: BMW Blue #1c69d4, BMW Type Next font, No front plates, No stock images
- ABR: Audi Red #BB0A21, Dark theme, No front plates, No stock images  
- BMW Jackson: BMW Blue #1c69d4, BMW Type Next font, No front plates, No stock images
- Harris Porsche: Black/White/Gray, Porsche Next font, Minimalist, No front plates

**E. Creator Roster** — simple table: Adrian Danylle (Video/Film, Active), Abbie Brunet (Video/Content, Active)

**F. Brand Fonts** — download links:
- BMW Type Next Pro: https://thecooperativeagency.github.io/fonts/bmw/BMWTypeNextPro-[Thin/Light/Regular/Medium/Bold/Black].otf
- Audi Type: https://thecooperativeagency.github.io/fonts/audi/AudiType-[Normal/Bold/Italic/WideNormal/WideBold]_4.03.woff2 + AudiTypeVF.ttf

Also check server/routes.ts for `GET /api/content-engine/cadence` — if missing, add it querying:
```sql
SELECT d.name as dealership_name, c.post_type, c.posts_per_day, c.days_of_week, c.platforms, c.is_active
FROM cadence_settings c JOIN dealerships d ON c.dealership_id = d.id
WHERE c.is_active = 1 ORDER BY d.name, c.post_type
```

Also check app-sidebar.tsx for the "Content Engine" nav item with BookOpen icon — add if missing.

After creating all files, run: `cd /Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/postengine/social-post-manager && npm run build 2>&1 | grep -E "error|Error|✓|built"` and confirm it builds clean.

content.Text:
Build is clean. Here's what was done:

- **Created** `client/src/pages/content-engine.tsx` with all 6 sections (Content Cadence, Active Shoots, Content Needed, Brand Guidelines, Creator Roster, Brand Fonts)
- **Already existed**: the route in `App.tsx` (line 71), the API endpoint in `server/routes.ts` (line 239), and the sidebar nav item in `app-sidebar.tsx` (line 42 with BookOpen icon)

The page fetches cadence data from `GET /api/content-engine/cadence` and shows the empty-state notice if none is configured. All other sections use the hardcoded data you specified. Build passes with no errors.
